task_completion.description: Verify that a new record named 'Brown v. Board of Education II' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a record in the library application's list or detail view with the Case Name 'Brown v. Board of Education II'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new record has the correct Volume and First Page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the detail view for 'Brown v. Board of Education II', the 'Volume' field must be '349' and the 'First Page' (or 'Page') field must be '294'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new record has the correct Date Decided/Year.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the detail view for 'Brown v. Board of Education II', the 'Date Decided' or 'Year' field must be '1955'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new record has the correct Abstract.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the detail view for 'Brown v. Board of Education II', the 'Abstract' field must contain the text: 'Implementation decree requiring desegregation of public schools with all deliberate speed, following the 1954 decision declaring segregation unconstitutional.'

task_completion.description: Verify that the original 1954 case remains in the library and is unchanged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the original 'Brown v. Board of Education' record in the library list. Its details must still show Volume '347', First Page '483', and Date Decided/Year '1954'.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual library/reference management GUI application to perform the duplication and edits.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a reference manager interface (like Zotero, JabRef, or similar) being interacted with, not just a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by running scripts to directly modify the underlying database files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the agent clicking 'Duplicate', editing text fields in the GUI, and saving, rather than executing SQL or Python scripts in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected output into a blank document to fake completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text must be entered into the specific metadata fields (Case Name, Volume, Page, Abstract) of the reference management software's detail pane.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original case is 'Brown v. Board of Education' (Volume 347, Page 483, Year 1954). The new duplicated case must be named 'Brown v. Board of Education II' with Volume 349, Page 294, and Year 1955. The abstract must contain the concepts of 'implementation', 'desegregation', and 'deliberate speed'.
